# Jules Moreau — Esports & Sport Operations Portfolio
# julesmoreau.eu | contact@julesmoreau.eu

## IDENTITY
Name: Jules Moreau
Current role: M1 International Sport Administration student, Université de Lille (STAPS/ISA program)
Location: Lille, France
Clearance: NATO Secret (French Navy Reserve, Second Maître / Petty Officer NCO)
Status: Seeking internship in Esports Operations & Event Management — April to August 2026
Target organizations: ESL FACEIT Group, BLAST, Twisted Minds, Talon Esports, Aspire Zone Foundation

## PROFILE SUMMARY
Jules Moreau is a hybrid sport-management/esports strategist combining military precision,
international mobility (French Guiana, New Caledonia, Congo), and hands-on production experience.
Former French Navy Reserve NCO. Grandmaster-level Overwatch 2 player.
Fluent in French (native) and English (C1). No formal coding background —
builds production-grade tools through AI-augmented workflows.

## ACADEMIC
Master's in Sport Sciences — International Sport Administration (ISA)
Université de Lille (STAPS) — 2025–2027
Specialization: Esports management, sport governance, sustainability

Bachelor's in Sport Sciences — Sport Management
ULCO — 2022–2025

## EXPERIENCE

### Head of Communications — ASN95 (AS Nortkerque football club)
Jan–Jun 2025 | Hauts-de-France, France
- Built complete digital presence from scratch (no prior content calendar, no visual guidelines)
- Created "Les Pronos du Sultan": weekly sponsor prediction game → +467% CTR
- Developed ASN95 Predict platform (beta, 88% complete): live rankings, user profiles, sponsor data layer
- 15+ visuals per season across 3 recurring formats, 5+ sponsors integrated per visual
- Match photography: 33 events covered, 500+ shots per match, 1,650+ edited photos across full season
- Managed matchday operations, visual identity, sponsor activation

### Infrastructure Tech — Bolt Echafaudage (via French Guiana mission)
Aug 2025 | Kourou, French Guiana
- Kourou Beach Festival & Tour de Guyane logistics
- Heavy material handling (Telehandlers), VIP complex construction under strict timing constraints

### Sales & Ops Support — Guyane Matériels
Jun–Jul 2025 | French Guiana
- Customer operations in tropical environment
- Product photography asset production

### French Navy Reservist — Petty Officer (Second Maître)
Since Jul 2022 | France
- Ecole de Maîtrance: military rigor, crisis management, team leadership
- NATO Secret clearance

## PROJECTS

### BLAST Strategic Case Study — "David vs. Goliath 2.0"
Type: Academic strategic analysis (23 pages)
Frameworks: PESTEL, VRIO, SWOT
Key findings: BLAST faces critical asymmetry vs EFG (Saudi PIF-backed ESL, $1.5Bn valuation vs $11M cash).
Valve 2025 regulation banning franchised partner leagues collapses BLAST's Louvre Agreement advantage.
Strategic recommendation: India pivot via JV with Reliance — 600M mobile gamers, bypass EFG's Western saturation.
3-phase execution roadmap: H1 2026 (Mumbai hub), H2 2026 (D2C gamification, Watch-to-Earn), 2027 (break-even).
CSR differentiation: "Brand Safety Shield" to attract Western sponsors avoiding EFG's Saudi PIF reputational risk.
Output: Full dossier PDF + interactive HTML presentation on portfolio

### Telegram Veille — AI Intelligence Dashboard
Type: Automated intelligence pipeline (production) — Business, Finance & Geopolitics
Tech stack: Python 3.11 + Telethon (Telegram crawling), GitHub Actions CRON (daily 18:00 Paris),
OpenRouter → Gemini 2.0 Flash (AI top-10 selection, single pass), Notion API (auto-rotating DB, max 100 entries),
Next.js 14 dashboard, Netlify deployment
Scale: 9 curated Telegram channels (Bloomberg, Reuters, BBC Breaking, Al Jazeera, Politico Europe,
SCMP, Clash Report, Our Wars Today, Intel Slava), 8 categories, top 10 daily briefing
Bias-awareness: Intel Slava flagged as pro-Russian — cross-referenced with other sources
Cost: ~$1/month operational
Status: Fully operational — live at intel-dashboard-telegram.netlify.app

### ASI Multisports Tournament — Event Management
Type: Field Operations (Comms Chief)
Date: December 2025 | Location: UFRSS Lille | Personnel: 500+
Sports: Disc Golf, Wheelchair BBL, Laser Tag, Spikeball
Equipment: Sony a6400 (primary), GoPro x2 (action cam)
Crisis management: 2 critical incidents resolved with zero event disruption
  - R-0200 FACILITY CONFLICT: Venue unavailable 2h before start → alternate gym secured in 45min, zero impact
  - R-0030 WEATHER HAZARD: Heavy rainfall → indoor fallback activated in 30min, 100% adaptability
Visual assets produced: Graphic charter, participant briefing (FR/EN bilingual), event poster

### Overwatch 2 Stats Dashboard
Type: Personal tool (production)
Tech: OverFast API, tactical/military aesthetic
Creator context: Grandmaster-level competitive player (former Top 500)

### Personal Portfolio — julesmoreau.eu
Type: Next.js single-page application
Aesthetic: Dark tactical/military "GOTHAM system"
Sections: Strategy (BLAST case study), Intel Core (Telegram Veille — Business/Finance/Geopolitics),
Field Ops (ASI Tournament), Signal (ASN95), Imagery (photography archive),
Build (client web deployments — Ferrant PHE, AS Nortkerque 95)

## CLIENT WEB BUILDS

### Ferrant P.H.E — ferrantphe.fr
Status: LIVE in production
Client: Family-owned essential oils & concentrates manufacturer (Rodelinghem, Hauts-de-France, est. 1989)
Scale: 16 products, 30 metric tons processed daily, supplies world's leading flavor houses
Tech stack: HTML5, CSS3, vanilla JavaScript, Tailwind CSS (CDN), Playfair Display + Lato fonts
Performance: PWA-ready (manifest, theme-color, Apple touch icon), lazy loading
SEO: JSON-LD schema, Open Graph, sitemap.xml, robots.txt
Discoverability: LLM layer via /llms.txt, structured data
Sections: Home (hero + FIE Frankfurt event badge), Products (16 SKUs filterable Oils/Concentrates with PDF datasheets), About (3-act company history + industrial specs: 4 extractors, 316L SS, biomass boiler), Contact (M. Adrien Ferrant)
Highlights: Bilingual FR/EN full UI, 16 downloadable PDF technical datasheets (FR+EN),
dynamic product catalog with category filter, no-JS fallback,
responsive (sidebar nav desktop / hamburger mobile), Kosher certification messaging
Build method: AI-augmented (GitHub Codex + Claude Code)

### AS Nortkerque 95 — asnortkerque95
Status: IN DEV (~50% complete)
Client: Local football club (Nortkerque, Pas-de-Calais, founded 1995)
Scale: 250+ members, 14 squads (Seniors A/B, U23, U18→U7, Women's, Futsal, Veterans, Animation Football),
youth academy U7→U17
Context: Club's first-ever official website — full digital debut, no prior web presence
Tech stack: HTML5, CSS3, vanilla JavaScript, Tailwind CSS (CDN), Bebas Neue + Inter fonts
Performance: WebP images, lazy loading
SEO: Open Graph, meta tags, sitemap.xml, local SEO targeting Nortkerque/Pas-de-Calais
Sections: Home ("More than a club, a family"), Teams (all 14 squads),
Gallery (matches & training with lightbox), Football School (U7→U17 academy),
Contact (info + form)
Design: Dark theme with club identity colors (green/yellow), mobile-first responsive
Strategic CTAs: "Join us" / "Our matches"
Build method: AI-augmented (GitHub Codex + Claude Code)
